name: Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the lard and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg, sour milk, baking soda, baking powder, nutmeg, and salt. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the flour and mix until a dough forms.
4. Roll out the dough and cut into desired shapes.
5. Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F (230°C).
6. Optional: Add currants or coconut to the batter before rolling out the dough.
